name: GutCheck
tagline: Stop overthinking. Let your instincts vote.
description: GutCheck is a tiny decision-duel app that helps you discover what you actually want by forcing rapid head-to-head choices between options.
detailedDescription: GutCheck turns indecision into a fast, playful sequence of one-on-one choice battles. Add a few options, tap through rapid duels, and let the app surface your true preference.

Instead of pretending every option is equally considered, GutCheck uses both selection outcomes and response speed to estimate confidence. The result feels more like revealing instinct than filling out a form.
targetUsers: Students and creators choosing what to do next

privacyPolicy.title: 情報の収集
privacyPolicy.content: 初期バージョンでは、入力した候補と比較結果を端末内でのみ扱います。
items: 結果表示用の一時スコア

privacyPolicy.title: 利用目的
privacyPolicy.content: 候補比較、ランキング表示、迷い傾向の可視化のためにのみ利用します。

privacyPolicy.title: 外部送信
privacyPolicy.content: 初期バージョンではアカウント登録、クラウド同期、外部送信を行いません。
